pages.raw_text:
One more life has been sacrificed
TO the cause of free speech. John
Kelley Cole, a leader of the young
er /. w. WIS in Chicago, was
ground to death beneath the
wheels of freight train near To.
mash, Wis, last Thursday, losing
his life in an effort to reach Spo-
kane to aid in the fight for free
speech.


With two companions, all penni-
less but imbued with determination
to aid, Cole left Chicago Monday
night, starting for Spokane be-
meath a freight car. All went well!
until Tomash was reached. Just as
the train started Cole lost his hold
and fell across rail. the entire
train passing over him before the
crew were aware of the fatal &C.
cident.


Cole was only 20 years of age,
but had been active in I. w. w.
circles for two years. He was 4
graduate of North Division high
scholo, starting the Red and
Black" socialistic paper, when a
school boy.
